title: Refactor a shared-mode test to use allow/3
prompt: A test module declares `use MyApp.DataCase, async: false` and calls `mode(MyApp.Repo, {:shared, self()})` because it spawns a single `Task.Supervisor.async` child. Rewrite to `test/my_app/report_builder_test.exs`: switch to `async: true`, remove the `mode(:shared)` call, and use `Ecto.Adapters.SQL.Sandbox.allow(MyApp.Repo, self(), task.pid)` to grant the spawned task access. This reclaims concurrency.
tier_rationale: Refactoring one pattern to another — requires understanding both mechanisms.
